description: Mal from Streamflow discusses the platform's role in addressing crypto scams, including rug pulls and bad token launches. Streamflow has processed over 600 million in various tokens and has over 1 million users. Upcoming features include permissionless token staking and aligned unlocks, which are milestone-based unlock mechanisms. Streamflow v2 aims to decentralize the platform and involve users as stakeholders.
topic_summary: Streamflow's solutions for crypto scams, upcoming features like token staking and aligned unlocks, and plans for decentralization [t=0:00-0:00].
